headlines.description: Gabriel Martinelli scored just 36 seconds after coming on to fire Arsenal to an impressive 2-0 win over Athletic Club in their Champions League opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Super subs give Arsenal perfect UCL start in Bilbao

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund and Juventus drew 4-4 in Turin on the opening night of the UEFA Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vlahovic's late heroics salvage 4-4 draw for Juve

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé converted two penalties and 10-man Real Madrid came back to beat visiting Marseille 2-1 on Tuesday on the opening night of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé fires Madrid to win after Weah opener

headlines.description: Luiz Júnior 's own goal gifted Tottenham a 1-0 home victory over Villarreal in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Comical own goal gives Spurs win over Villarreal

headlines.description: Marcus Thuram netted a brace of headers as Inter Milan earned a 2-0 Champions League victory over Ajax at the Johan Cruyff Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thuram scores twice as Inter Milan beat Ajax

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored twice as Chelsea fell to a 3-1 defeat to Bayern Munich at the Allianz Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane double helps Bayern ease past Chelsea

headlines.description: Liverpool captain Virgil van Dijk soared to score with a header in the second minute of stoppage time to seal a 3-2 win over Atletico Madrid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Van Dijk heads Liverpool to rousing win over Atleti

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain made a winning start in defence of their Champions League title as they outclassed Atalanta in an impressive 4-0 win at Parc des Princes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holders PSG outclass Atalanta 4-0 in UCL opener

headlines.description: New Bayer Leverkusen boss Kasper Hjulmand saw his return to Denmark deliver a dramatic stoppage-time 2-2 draw with F.C. København at Parken Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen rescue dramatic draw in Copenhagen

headlines.description: Erling Haaland became the fastest player to reach 50 Champions League goals as the Manchester City star set Pep Guardiola's side on course for a 2-0 victory against 10-man Napoli.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland, Doku give City win over 10-man Napoli

headlines.description: Marcus Rashford reminded Man United of what they are missing with a stunning double to ease Barcelona to a 2-1 Champions League victory at Newcastle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rashford stars as Barcelona outclass Newcastle

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé's fourth Champions League hat trick helped Real Madrid bounce back from their weekend derby thrashing with a 5-0 win away to Kairat.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé bags hat trick as Madrid thrash Kairat

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann scored his 200th goal for Atletico Madrid as they made light of Diego Simeone's ban to beat Eintracht Frankfurt 5-1 in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Simeone sit out as Atlético thrash Frankfurt

headlines.description: An 89th-minute own goal by Jostein Gundersen spared Tottenham Hotspur's blushes and earned them a fortunate 2-2 draw away to Bodo/Glimt in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late own goal helps Spurs draw with Bodo/Glimt

headlines.description: Jose Mourinho's Stamford Bridge homecoming ended in defeat as Chelsea got their Champions League season going at the second attempt with a 1-0 win over Benfica.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea edge Benfica to spoil Mourinho's return

headlines.description: Liverpool fell to a second-straight defeat as Arne Slot's side saw their first Champions League away trip of the season end in a 1-0 loss to Galatasaray.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool downed by Galatasaray in tense clash

headlines.description: Lautaro Martínez scored a brace as Inter Milan beat Slavia Prague 3-0 in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lautaro double fires Inter past Slavia Prague

headlines.description: Harry Kane continued his red-hot form with a first-half double as Bayern Munich thrashed Cypriot champions Pafos 5-1 in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane stays hot with brace  in Bayern Munich rout

headlines.description: Nick Woltemade answered Karl-Heinz Rummenigge's "idiot" jibe in perfect style as he scored for the third time in four games as Newcastle United cruised to a 4-0 victory at Union Saint-Gilloise.
headlines.shortLinkText: Woltemade, Gordon lead Newcastle in UCL rout

headlines.description: Bukayo Saka eased some increasingly frayed Arsenal nerves with a late goal to secure his side a 2-0 Champions League win over Olympiacos.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saka on target as Arsenal beat Olympiacos

headlines.description: Eric Dier scored a controversial 90th-minute penalty to deny Manchester City as AS Monaco twice came from behind in a 2-2 draw at the Stade Louis II.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dier denies City win in Monaco after Haaland brace

headlines.description: Gonçalo Ramos scored late in second-half stoppage time to give Paris Saint-Germain a 2-1 win over Barcelona at the Olympic Stadium on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Short-handed PSG rally to beat Barcelona again

headlines.description: Ismael Saibari hit the equaliser as PSV Eindhoven frustrated Bayer Leverkusen with a 1-1 draw at the BayArena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Saibari goal gives PSV draw with Bayer Leverkusen

headlines.description: Rasmus Højlund struck twice to give Napoli a 2-1 victory over Sporting in their Champions League clash at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona.
headlines.shortLinkText: Højlund double fires Napoli to win over Sporting

headlines.description: Fermín López scored a hat trick and Marcus Rashord hit two goals as Barcelona routed Olympiacos 6-1 in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fermín hat trick, Rashford brace lead Barça rout

headlines.description: Viktor Gyökeres found the back of the net for the first time in eight matches as a 13-minute second-half blitz saw Arsenal beat Atlético Madrid 4-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal score 4 in 13 mins to thrash Atlético

headlines.description: Five goals, two red cards and two penalties. The first half of Bayer Leverkusen's 7-2 loss to Paris Saint-Germain in the Champions League on Tuesday was wild.
headlines.shortLinkText: Doué dazzles, Dembélé scores in 7-goal PSG rout

headlines.description: Harvey Barnes scored twice as Newcastle boosted their hopes of making it to the knockout stages of the Champions League with a 3-0 victory over Benfica.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barnes brace helps Newcastle beat José's Benfica

headlines.description: Ricardo Pepi scored off the bench as PSV Eindhoven came from behind to thrash Italian champions Napoli 6-2 in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pepi scores, Dest benched as PSV hit Napoli for 6

headlines.description: Internazionale made it three wins from three in the Champions League, overcoming a shaky start to thrash Union Saint-Gilloise 4-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter cruise to stay perfect in UCL league phase

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur remain unbeaten in this season's Champions League but they were perhaps fortunate to escape from a point from their trip to Monaco on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vicario helps Spurs cling on to point in Monaco

headlines.description: Bayern Munich made short work of Club Brugge with three goals in the first half as they earned a commanding 4-0 victory in the Champions League at the Allianz Arena.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores in 10th straight game as Bayern cruise

headlines.description: Chelsea romped to a 5-1 win over Ajax at Stamford Bridge as Brazilian teenager Estêvão provided further evidence of his scintillating talent.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea teens lead 5-goal night in win over Ajax

headlines.description: Liverpool ended their four-game winless streak in emphatic style on Wednesday as Arne Slot's team put five goals past Eintracht Frankfurt in Germany.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool snap 4-game losing streak with 5-1 win

headlines.description: Jude Bellingham's first goal of the season extended Real Madrid's 100 percent start to their Champions League campaign with a 1-0 win over Juventus.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham ends goal drought as Madrid beat Juve

headlines.description: Napoli drew another blank at the Maradona Stadium as they were held 0-0 by Eintracht Frankfurt on matchday four in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli frustrated at home by Eintracht Frankfurt

headlines.description: Arsenal took another step towards the Champions League round-of-16 with a 3-0 win over Slavia Prague on a night when more records tumbled.
headlines.shortLinkText: Merino bags double as Arsenal beat Slavia Prague

headlines.description: Atlético Madrid returned to winning ways in the Champions League with a 3-1 victory over Union Saint-Gilloise.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atlético Madrid back on track with win over Union

headlines.description: Alexis Mac Allister's second-half header capped a dominant performance as Liverpool ended Real Madrid's 100 percent Champions League record with a 1-0 victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mac Allister heads Liverpool to win over Madrid

headlines.description: Luis Díaz scored twice and was sent off as 10-man Bayern Munich held on for a 2-1 Champions League win against holders Paris Saint-Germain at the Parc des Princes.
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-man Bayern hold off PSG rally after Díaz red

headlines.description: Micky van de Ven's goal of the season contender helped Tottenham to a 4-0 thrashing of Copenhagen in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Van de Ven nets after 90-meter run in Spurs rout

headlines.description: Chelsea were held to a 2-2 draw by Qarabag in Baku as their hopes of achieving direct passage to the Champions League round of 16 received a blow.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea held to draw after long trip to Qarabag

headlines.description: Club Brugge were denied a famous victory over Barcelona after Romeo Vermant's stoppage-time effort was ruled out by Anthony Taylor to ensure a thrilling Champions League encounter finished 3-3.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barça rally falls short in shock draw at Brugge

headlines.description: Inter Milan survived a scare but maintained their perfect record in the Champions League with a 2-1 win at home to Kairat Almaty.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter fend off Kairat to keep perfect UCL record

headlines.description: Phil Foden scored twice and Erling Haaland found the net against his former club as Manchester City beat Borussia Dortmund 4-1.
headlines.shortLinkText: Foden stars, Haaland sets latest record in City win

headlines.description: Dan Burn produced a header of brutal beauty as they eased to a 2-0 Champions League victory over Athletic Club.
headlines.shortLinkText: Burn's sublime header inspires Newcastle win

headlines.description: It took the Special One five tries to do it, but Jose Mourinho finally guided Benfica to a first Champions League win of the season on Tuesday in Amsterdam.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mourinho gets first UCL win with Benfica in 5th try

headlines.description: Concacaf rivals Weston McKennie and Jonathan David teamed up for a pair of goals to hand Juventus a late -- and needed -- win over Bodo/Glimt in the Champions League on Tuesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: U.S., Canada rivals McKennie, David key Juve win

headlines.description: Estêvão scored an outstanding individual goal as Chelsea got their Champions League campaign back on track with a big 3-0 win over 10-man Barcelona at Stamford Bridge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Estêvão, Delap lead Chelsea to big win over Barça

headlines.description: Manchester City paid the price for making wholesale changes as they slumped to a surprise 2-0 home loss to Bayer Leverkusen in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leverkusen beat much-changed City at Etihad

headlines.description: Pierre-Emerick Aubameyang dented Newcastle United's Champions League charge as Marseille came from behind to claim their second win of the campaign.
headlines.shortLinkText: Aubameyang brace sees Marseille down Newcastle

headlines.description: Scott McTominay spared the blushes of Rasmus Højlund as Napoli celebrated victory on the fifth anniversary of Diego Maradona's death by beating Qarabag.
headlines.shortLinkText: McTominay spares Højlund's blushes in Napoli win

headlines.description: Arsenal end Bayern's unbeaten season to top UCL standings
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal end Bayern's unbeaten season to top UCL

headlines.description: José María Giménez scored a header deep into stoppage time as Atlético Madrid snatched a 2-1 home victory over Inter Milan in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giménez heads Atleti to late win over Inter Milan

headlines.description: The crisis affecting Liverpool deepened with a calamitous 4-1 Champions League home defeat to PSV Eindhoven.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool slump deepens with home rout by PSV

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé helped himself to the second fastest hat-trick in Champions League history and four goals in total as Real Madrid came from behind to beat Olympiacos 4-3 in Piraeus.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid hold off Olympiacos with Mbappé's 4 goals

headlines.description: A hat trick by Paris Saint-Germain midfielder Vitinha consigned Tottenham Hotspur to another defeat on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vitinha hat trick helps PSG overpower Spurs

headlines.description: Bayern Munich teenager Lennart Karl made more history in his side's 3-1 Champions League win over Sporting CP on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern teen Karl makes more history in UCL win

headlines.description: Chelsea gave up a halftime lead to fall to a 2-1 Champions League defeat to Atalanta on Tuesday in Bergamo to leave their hopes of a top-eight finish on a knife edge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta score late to take down Chelsea in UCL

headlines.description: Headers by Jules Koundé three minutes apart gave Barcelona a 2-1 comeback victory over Eintracht Frankfurt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Koundé headers help Barcelona battle back for win

headlines.description: Liverpool brushed off the absence of Mohamed Salah with a 1-0 Champions League victory over Inter Milan in San Siro.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah-less Liverpool win at Inter with late penalty

headlines.description: Atlético Madrid held off PSV Eindhoven to win an incident-packed Champions League clash 3-2.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pepi scores but PSV let lead slip against Atleti

headlines.description: Second-half penalties by Mohammed Kudus and Xavi Simons helped Tottenham to a routine 3-0 win over Slavia Prague to keep alive their Champions League top-eight prospects.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kudus, Simons on target as Spurs trash Slavia Prague

headlines.description: Mason Greenwood scored twice as Marseille injected life into their Champions League campaign with a 3-2 victory at Union St.-Gilloise.
headlines.shortLinkText: Greenwood double sends Marseille past Union St.-Gilloise

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain drew a blank for the second time in three outings as they were held to a goalless draw at Athletic Club in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG frustrated in draw with Athletic in Bilbao

headlines.description: Alejandro Grimaldo broke Newcastle's hearts as he struck late to deny them Champions League victory at Bayer Leverkusen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcastle concede late equaliser in draw with Bayer Leverkusen

headlines.description: Noni Madueke scored twice to fire Arsenal to a 3-0 victory at Club Brugge and all-but assure their qualification for the Champions League knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Noni Madueke nets twice as Arsenal march past Club Brugge

headlines.description: Manchester City came from behind to heap the pressure on Real Madrid boss Xabi Alonso with a stunning 2-1 win at the Bernabeu on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: City win over Madrid puts more pressure on Xabi

headlines.description: Manchester City slumped to one of the most humiliating upsets in Champions League history, losing to a 3-1 at tiny Norwegian club Bodø/Glimt on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: 10-man Man City stunned by tiny Bodø/Glimt

headlines.description: Gabriel Jesus struck a first-half brace to fire an unstoppable Arsenal to an impressive 3-1 victory against Inter Milan and confirm their place in the last 16 of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dominant Arsenal beat Inter, cruise into last 16

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé punished former club Monaco as Real Madrid romped to a 6-1 Champions League victory at the Santiago Bernabeu.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé double leads 6-goal Madrid rout of Monaco

headlines.description: Luis Suárez scored twice as Sporting CP stunned Paris Saint-Germain 2-1 in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting upset PSG with late Luis Suárez strike

headlines.description: Dominic Solanke scored as Tottenham claimed a 2-0 win over Borussia Dortmund.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs ease pressure on Frank with Dortmund win

headlines.description: Atlético Madrid drew 1-1 against Galatasaray in Istanbul to leave their hopes of a Champions League top-eight group stage finish in the balance.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atlético Madrid held by Galatasaray in Turkey

headlines.description: Harry Kane scored twice as 10-man Bayern Munich sealed their place in the Champions League round of 16 with a 2-0 win against Union Saint-Gilloise.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores 2, misses pen as Bayern make last 16

headlines.description: Chelsea will go into the final Champions League matchday in an automatic qualification spot after Moises Caicedo's late header earned a nervy 1-0 win against Pafos at Stamford Bridge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rosenior gets first UCL win as Chelsea coach

headlines.description: Dominik Szoboszlai helped Liverpool to a 3-0 victory in Marseille that made a Champions League top-eight finish all the more likely.
headlines.shortLinkText: Liverpool beat Marseille to close in on UCL last 16

headlines.description: Newcastle moved into the top eight of the UCL league phase with a 3-0 win over PSV Eindhoven.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcastle see off PSV as Guimarães suffers injury

headlines.description: Barcelona overcame a scare to boost their hopes of automatic qualification for the Champions League last 16 with a hard-fought 4-2 win at Slavia Prague.
headlines.shortLinkText: Fermin sparks Barça rally as Yamal serves ban

headlines.description: Arsenal finished top of the Champions League group phase table after a 3-2 win over Kairat Almaty.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal complete Champions League clean sweep with 3-2 Kairat win

headlines.description: Bodo/Glimt secured a spot in the Champions League playoffs after back-to-back upsets against Manchester City and Atletico Madrid to close out the league phase.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bodo/Glimt topple Atletico to reach UCL playoffs

headlines.description: With an assist and a goal, Yamal led Barcelona's comeback against F.C. København and helped the Catalan club secure a top-eight finish in the league phase of the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona storm from behind to seal last-16 spot

headlines.description: Benfica stunned Real Madrid with a 4-2 win, knocking the LaLiga giants out of the top eight and securing their own playoff spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: GK goal sinks Madrid, sends Benfica to playoffs

headlines.description: Spurs are straight through to the knockout stage of the Champions League with a 2-0 win at Eintracht Frankfurt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Randal Kolo Muani strikes as Spurs book place in Champions League last-16

headlines.description: Liverpool put their domestic problems behind them as they comfortably eased into the round of 16 of the Champions League with a 6-0 victory over Qarabag.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah in on goal-fest as Liverpool clinch top 8

headlines.description: Erling Haaland ended his goal drought as Manchester City sneaked into the last 16 of the Champions League with a 2-0 win over Galatasaray.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland ends drought as City clinch last-16 spot

headlines.description: João Pedro led a Chelsea fightback that saw them through to the Champions League last 16 with two second-half goals to beat Napoli 3-2 at the Diego Maradona Stadium.
headlines.shortLinkText: Chelsea clinch top 8 with win, eliminate Napoli

headlines.description: Ousmane Dembélé had a penalty saved as holders Paris Saint-Germain were forced to settle for a Champions League playoff place following a draw with Newcastle.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dembélé missed pen sees PSG settle for playoff

headlines.description: Harry Kane scores late winner as Bayern confirm second place finish
headlines.shortLinkText: Harry Kane scores late winner as Bayern confirm second place finish

headlines.description: Galatasaray pushed Juventus to the brink of elimination from the Champions League in a wild 5-2 comeback win in Istanbul on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Galatasaray trounce Juve in UCL playoff first leg

headlines.description: Désiré Doué replaced the injured Ousmane Dembélé to spark Paris Saint-Germain's remarkable 3-2 comeback victory in the first leg of their Champions League play-off against Ligue 1 rivals Monaco.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG rally past Monaco after Dembélé forced off

headlines.description: Real Madrid's 1-0 Champions League playoff round win over Benfica in Lisbon was overshadowed by alleged racist abuse of Vinícius Júnior.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid edge Benfica amid Vinícius racism allegations

headlines.description: Anthony Gordon plundered four goals as Newcastle took a stranglehold on their Champions League play-off against Qarabag with a rampant 6-1 first-leg victory in Baku.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gordon scores 4 as Newcastle put 6 past Qarabag

headlines.description: Champions League runner-up Inter Milan became the latest top team to suffer an upset by Bodø/Glimt in the Champions League, losing 3-1 away in the first leg of their playoff on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bodo/Glimt add win over Inter to impressive run

headlines.description: Christos Tzolis' 89th-minute goal snatched a 3-3 draw for Club Brugge as Atlético Madrid's defensive problems in the Champions League continued.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brugge shock Atlético Madrid with late equaliser

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Atlético Madrid advance 7-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Atlético Madrid advance 7-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: Alexander Sørloth scored a hat trick as Atlético Madrid secured their place in the last 16 of the Champions League with a 4-1 second-leg playoff win against Club Brugge.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sørloth hat trick fires Atlético to UCL last 16

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 2-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayer Leverkusen advance 2-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bodo/Glimt pulled off one of the biggest upsets in Champions League history by knocking out Italian giants Inter Milan on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Tiny Bodo/Glimt oust Inter Milan in UCL stunner

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Newcastle United advance 9-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Newcastle United advance 9-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: Eddie Howe guided Newcastle into the last 16 of the Champions League for the first time as they sealed their passage from the play-offs with an entertaining 3-2 home victory over Qarabag.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcasle cruise into RO16 after Qarabag thrashing

headlines.description: Atalanta converted a penalty with the last kick of the game to beat Borussia Dortmund 4-1 and secure a place in the round of 16 in the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atalanta shock Dortmund with last-gasp penalty

headlines.description: Juventus came close to completing one of the great Champions League second-leg comebacks before being eliminated by Galatasaray after extra time on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Osimhen ends Juve rally to put Gala into last 16

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 5-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 5-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: Mamadou Coulibaly's red card cost his side dearly as AS Monaco drew 2-2 at defending champion Paris Saint-Germain in the second leg of their Champions League playoff on Wednesday and went out 5-4 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG advance to set up Barça or Chelsea clash

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: With the winning goal and another corner-flag dance, Vinícius Júnior fittingly had the final say in an emotionally charged rematch with Benfica to guide Real Madrid into the round of 16 of the Champions League on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Madrid get past Benfica to reach UCL last 16

headlines.description: Arne Slot's 100th match as Liverpool boss ended in defeat as Galatasaray capitalised on a sloppy display to win the first leg of this Champions League last-16 tie 1-0 on a deafening evening in Istanbul.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gala gain upper hand in 1st leg win over Liverpool

headlines.description: Michael Olise played a starring role as Bayern Munich demolished Atalanta 6-1 to virtually guarantee their place in the Champions League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Rampant Bayern net 6 at Atalanta in 1st-leg rout

headlines.description: Tottenham's Champions League campaign is all but over after Antonin Kinsky's error-strewn display proved the catalyst for a punishing 5-2 loss at Atlético Madrid to heighten scrutiny on Igor Tudor.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs collapse in 1st half, Atléti lead UCL tie

headlines.description: Lamine Yamal denied Newcastle United a priceless victory with the final kick of the game as Barcelona snatched a draw which sends them into next week's return as favourites to make the Champions League quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Yamal breaks Newcastle hearts with late Barça pen

headlines.description: Kai Havertz scored a penalty against his former side Bayer Leverkusen to take a 1-1 scoreline back to the Emirates.
headlines.shortLinkText: Havertz gives Arsenal draw in Leverkusen return

headlines.description: Norwegian outfit Bodo/Glimt took another step forward in their remarkable Champions League journey after a statement 3-0 win over Sporting Lisbon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bodo's CL fairytale continues in 3-0 Sporting win

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain scored three goals in the final 20 minutes as the holders overwhelmed Chelsea 5-2 in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie at the Parc des Princes on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG's late surge overwhelms Chelsea in 1st leg

headlines.description: Federico Valverde's stellar first-half hat trick was the catalyst as Real Madrid eased past Manchester City 3-0 in the first leg of their Champions League round-of-16 match Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Valverde's hat trick dazzles as Madrid dump City

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Sporting CP advance 5-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Sporting CP advance 5-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: Sporting CP became the fifth team to overturn a three-goal first-leg deficit to progress in the Champions League knockout rounds with a 5-3 aggregate win over Bodo/Glimt.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sporting score 5 in 2nd leg to end dream Bodo run

headlines.description: Eberechi Eze scored a stunning first Champions League goal as Arsenal beat Bayer Leverkusen 2-0 on Tuesday at the Emirates to march into the quarterfinals.
headlines.shortLinkText: Eze stunner seals Arsenal spot in UCL quarters

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 8-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 8-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Chelsea's interest in the Champions League came to a sobering end as Paris Saint-Germain won 3-0 at Stamford Bridge to dump the Blues out 8-2 on aggregate in the last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG condemn Chelsea to joint-heaviest UCL loss

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 5-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 5-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Real Madrid silenced the Etihad on Tuesday as a Vinicius Junior brace earned a 2-1 win over Manchester City, extinguishing any hopes of a Champions League comeback.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vini brace silences City as Madrid secures QF spot

headlines.description: Barcelona put on a thrilling second-half show to rout Newcastle United 7-2 at the Camp Nou and progress to the Champions League quarterfinals 8-3 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: 7-goal Barcelona run wild in rout of Newcastle

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 10-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 10-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Harry Kane became the first English player to hit 50 Champions League goals, scoring twice as Bayern Munich humbled Atalanta again to complete a 10-2 aggregate win on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane double helps Bayern seal rout of Atalanta

headlines.description: Mohamed Salah scored a spectacular 50th Champions League goal as Liverpool cruised through to the quarterfinals with a 4-0 win over Galatasaray at Anfield on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Salah's landmark goal helps Liverpool to UCL QF

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Atlético Madrid advance 7-5 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Atlético Madrid advance 7-5 on aggregate

headlines.description: Tottenham Hotspur bowed out of the Champions League but only after a rip-roaring last-16 second leg with Atlético Madrid where Xavi Simons' brace helped them to a first home victory in two months.
headlines.shortLinkText: Spurs get hollow win, exit UCL at hands of Atleti

headlines.description: Harry Kane delivered for Bayern Munich on his return from injury, scoring a goal and helping set up another in his team's 2-1 win at Real Madrid.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane gives Bayern 1st-leg edge at Real Madrid

headlines.description: Kai Havertz scored a stoppage-time winner to fire Arsenal to a crucial 1-0 victory against Sporting in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal in Lisbon.
headlines.shortLinkText: Havertz rescues Arsenal in 1st-leg win vs. Sporting

headlines.description: Julián Álvarez and Alexander Sørloth struck as Atlético Madrid upset 10-man Barcelona to win the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal 2-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Álvarez leads Atleti to 1st-leg edge over Barça

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain dominated Liverpool to emerge with a 2-0 victory that could have been far greater in the first leg of their Champions League quarterfinal.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG dominate shot-shy Liverpool in Paris 1st leg
